description.en: A devotional verse addressing the Divine as mother, father, friend, and everything. Often associated with Ganesha or used as a universal prayer of surrender.
description.pt: Um verso devocional que se dirige ao Divino como mãe, pai, amigo e tudo. Frequentemente associado a Ganesha ou usado como oração universal de entrega.

about.en: This verse expresses complete surrender: "You alone are mother, you alone are father." It is often chanted in Ganesha worship or as a general offering to the divine as the sole refuge and support.
about.pt: Este verso exprime entrega total: "Só Tu és a mãe, só Tu és o pai." É frequentemente cantado no culto a Ganesha ou como oferta geral ao divino como único refúgio e suporte.

lines.transliteration: tvam eva mātā ca pitā tvam eva

translations.en: You alone are mother and you alone are father; you alone are relative and you alone are friend; you alone are knowledge and you alone are wealth; you alone are everything to me, O God of gods.
translations.pt: Só Tu és a mãe e só Tu és o pai; só Tu és o parente e só Tu és o amigo; só Tu és o conhecimento e só Tu és a riqueza; só Tu és tudo para mim, ó Deus dos deuses.

lines.transliteration: tvam eva bandhuś ca sakhā tvam eva

translations.en: You alone are mother and you alone are father; you alone are relative and you alone are friend; you alone are knowledge and you alone are wealth; you alone are everything to me, O God of gods.

lines.transliteration: tvam eva vidyā draviṇaṃ tvam eva

lines.transliteration: tvam eva sarvaṃ mama deva deva
